title: Silky Post-Workout Paleo Clove Polish Dish
description: A sweet and silky post-workout dish featuring cloves, paleo-friendly ingredients for a delightful finish to your workout.

ingredients.name: Paleo Protein Blend
ingredients.notes: A mix of almond flour, coconut flour, and stevia.

ingredients.name: Organic Dates
ingredients.notes: Choose dates with natural pits to remove before use.

ingredients.name: Vanilla Extract
ingredients.notes: Natural or vanilla-flavored for an extra touch of sweetness and flavor.

ingredients.name: Coconut Sugar (optional)
ingredients.notes: To sweeten the dish, adjust to taste.

ingredients.name: Clove Paste
ingredients.notes: Freshly ground or ready-made paste for added flavor and aroma.

ingredients.name: Honey (optional)
ingredients.notes: To complement the dish, optional as it’s not paleo-friendly but adds a touch of sweetness.

instructions: Blend together Paleo Protein Blend, Raw Almond Butter, dates (de-pitted), vanilla extract, and optional Coconut Sugar in a food processor until smooth.
If using Honey, mix it into the blended mixture last to prevent burning if heating further.
Stir in Clove Paste until well incorporated. The mixture will thicken up slightly as it cooks down from moisture.
Pour the mixture into an oven-safe dish and bake at 160°C (320°F) for about 25 minutes or until set.
For serving, garnish with chopped Pistachios and a drizzle of Coconut Sugar if desired.
Serve chilled as this will make it more refreshing post-workout.
